Macros
- Single, Dual, Split & Manual
Functionality

Values below match the bit positions in the SYSTEM__MODE_START register do not change. More...

Collaboration diagram for - Single, Dual, Split & Manual:

Macros

#define VL53L1_DEVICEREADOUTMODE_DUAL_SD   (0x01 << 2)
 
#define VL53L1_DEVICEREADOUTMODE_SINGLE_SD   (0x00 << 2)
 
#define VL53L1_DEVICEREADOUTMODE_SPLIT_MANUAL   (0x03 << 2)
 
#define VL53L1_DEVICEREADOUTMODE_SPLIT_READOUT   (0x02 << 2)
 

Detailed Description

Values below match the bit positions in the SYSTEM__MODE_START register do not change.
